title: DoseDesk plausibility range record
description: A single reference range used ONLY to grade plausibility of a computed dose. It never overrides the deterministic calculation and never asserts a dose is 'wrong' — it produces a graded, confidence-tagged prompt to verify. A range with no source or confidence is invalid by design: provenance is a required field, not an afterthought.

parameter.description: the dosing parameter the range applies to, e.g. mcg/kg/min

lower.description: exact decimal as string; empty string if unbounded

upper.description: exact decimal as string; empty string if unbounded

indication.description: indication this range applies to, if narrow; blank = general

source.description: e.g. 'DailyMed SPL', 'openFDA label', 'commonly cited educational reference'

confidence.description: travels with every warning. A warning without confidence is noise.
